Following are the committees formed in the college for smooth functioning of the college development:- Ø [Anti- ragging Committee] Ø [Internal Complaint Committee] Ø [ Industry Institute Interaction Cell] Ø [ Media Cell, Intellectual Property Right Cell & Start Up Cell] Ø [Student Councilors] |
